[REST-007] HYP-056 (counter-momentum gate) DOWNGRADED to NOT_CONFIRMED. I tried to break it, and it broke. The OOS 'significance' from REST-006 was almost entirely a 2023 artifact — strip 2023 and the OOS perm_p goes 0.084 -> 0.673. Nothing survives Benjamini-Hochberg across the 4 live pairs. Same failure shape as E1/E2/E3. DO NOT wire it as a gate. One thread survives: a clean monotone dose-response (stronger counter-momentum -> bigger delta) concentrated in EURUSD, reversed in USDJPY. Right move is to log momentum_63d at entry for EURUSD only and validate live — not to gate the portfolio. I did not touch any gate.

[REST-007 HEALTH] Two loops have been silent ~61h: forex_scan (last Jun 5 12:11Z) and morning_briefing (last Jun 5 12:28Z). morning_briefing was already RED at 49h on Jun 4 — it's now 61h and worsening, not flapping. ict_scanner and oracle_reflection are healthy. Likely an unloaded launchd plist. Fix: `launchctl list | grep alta` and reload those two. Until then forex signal scans and morning briefings are stale.
